serviceDescription: With Amazon SageMaker, you pay only for what you use. Building, training, and deploying ML models is billed by the second, with no minimum fees and no upfront commitments.

templates.title: SageMaker Feature Store
templates.helpText: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store is a central repository to ingest, store and serve features for machine learning. You are charged for writes, reads, and data storage on the SageMaker Feature Store. Writes are charged as write request units per KB, reads are charged as read request units per 4KB, and data storage is charged per GB per month.

cards.title: Feature Store data storage (standard)
cards.helpText: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store is a central repository to ingest, store and serve features for machine learning. You are charged for feature group writes, reads, and data storage, with different pricing for the standard online store and in-memory online store. For the standard online store, data storage is charged per GB per month.

cards.title: Feature Store write request units (standard on-demand)
cards.helpText: For throughput with standard online store, you can choose between on-demand or provisioned capacity mode. For on-demand, writes are charged as write request units (WRUs) per KB.

components.label: price for sagemaker datastore write requests

components.outputUnitLabel: unrounded write request units needed per record
write request units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: write request units needed per record
operands.variableUnitLabel: write request units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: price for sagemaker datastore write requests

cards.title: Feature Store read request units (standard on-demand)
cards.helpText: For throughput with standard online store, you can choose between on-demand or provisioned capacity mode. For on-demand, reads are charged as read request units (RRUs) per 4 KB.

components.label: price for sagemaker datastore read requests

components.outputUnitLabel: unrounded read request units needed per record
read request units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: read request units needed per record
operands.variableUnitLabel: read request units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: price for sagemaker datastore read requests

cards.title: Feature Store write capacity units (standard provisioned)
cards.helpText: For throughput with standard online store, you can choose between on-demand or provisioned capacity mode. For provisioned, you will be charged for the throughput capacity you provision for your feature group, even if you do not fully utilize the provisioned capacity. For provisioned, writes are charged as one write capacity unit (WCU) for each write per second (up to 1 KB).

components.label: price for sagemaker datastore write rates

components.outputUnitLabel: unrounded write capacity units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: price for sagemaker datastore write rates

components.label: Total cost for write capacity units

cards.title: Feature Store read capacity units (standard provisioned)
cards.helpText: For throughput with standard online store, you can choose between on-demand or provisioned capacity mode. For provisioned, you will be charged for the throughput capacity you provision for your feature group, even if you do not fully utilize the provisioned capacity. For provisioned, reads are charged as one read capacity unit (RCU) for each read per second (up to 4 KB).

components.label: price for sagemaker datastore read rates

components.outputUnitLabel: unrounded read capacity units needed per record

operands.variableUnitLabel: unrounded read capacity units needed per record

operands.variableLabel: price for sagemaker datastore read rates

components.label: Total cost for Read capacity units

cards.title: Feature Store data storage (in-memory)
cards.helpText: For the in-memory online store, data storage is charged per GB per hour. There is a minimum data storage charge of 5 GiB (5.37 GB) per hour for the in-memory online store.

cards.title: Feature Store write request units (in-memory)
cards.helpText: For the in-memory online store, writes are charged as write request units (WRUs) per KB with a minimum of 1 unit per write.

cards.title: Feature Store read request units (in-memory)
cards.helpText: For the in-memory online store, reads are charged as read request units (RRUs) per KB with a minimum of 1 unit per read.
